title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
